product_description: an AI-powered marketing intelligence platform that helps growth teams optimize campaign performance and reduce wasted ad spend

product_metadata.pricing: Plans start at $799 per month. Teams spending over $50K/month on ads typically see full ROI within 30 days.
product_metadata.avg_waste_reduction: Teams recover an average of 15-30% of wasted ad spend within the first 60 days.
product_metadata.setup_time: Connects to Google, Meta, and LinkedIn in under 48 hours with no downtime.
product_metadata.case_study: A B2B SaaS team running $120K/month across three channels cut their cost-per-lead by 28% in the first month by eliminating audience overlap between retargeting and prospecting campaigns.

opening: Hi {prospect_name}, this is Jordan calling from PulseIQ. We use AI to help marketing teams improve their campaign ROI. Do you have a few minutes to chat?
value_propositions: Our clients reduce wasted ad spend by an average of 15-30% within the first 60 days
PulseIQ connects all your ad channels into one dashboard so your team spends less time on manual reporting
We help teams identify underperforming audience segments and budget inefficiencies they cannot see in individual platform dashboards

objection_handlers.price: I understand budget is a concern. The platform does pay for itself over time through better campaign performance.
objection_handlers.not_interested: I hear you. Is there a better time to call, or someone else I should speak with?
objection_handlers.already_have_solution: That makes sense. A lot of teams use multiple tools. We might be able to complement what you already have.
objection_handlers.no_time: No problem, I can be quick. We just help teams get more out of their ad spend.
objection_handlers.need_approval: Of course. Would it help if I sent over some information you could share with them?
objection_handlers.data_privacy: We take data privacy seriously and are compliant with relevant regulations.

closing: Would it make sense to set up a quick call so I can show you how it works for teams like yours?
